/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/mini_ppti.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mini_ppti.dir/src/ckks_runner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mini_ppti.dir/src/profiler.cpp.o -o mini_ppti   -L/usr/local/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEpke.1.4.2.dylib /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEbinfhe.1.4.2.dylib /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEcore.1.4.2.dylib -Xpreprocessor -fopenmp -lomp -Wno-unused-command-line-argument /opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib/libomp.dylib
